Here in Sarasota, we are scared.

the important thing to remember is don't panic. You don't have to leave the state and it's kind of too late anyway. Get your most important belongings together and find higher ground with a sturdy structure if you are in a low lying area. You still have tomorrow and possibly Wednesday. If you are under a canopy of trees, find the least spot they could fall on as your safe zone. It's almost impossible to leave your county and definatly impossible to leave the state at this point. But you just need a strong structure on high ground as close to your house. Bring your important documents and what ever canned food you have as well as a change of clothing and a few comfort items. Don't try to get on the interstate or highway out of town. They are already backed up and you will be more vulnerable.
